description:
A professional, easy to use feet & inch calculator

Sprinkler Fitter Calculator (SFC) is a professional, easy to use feet & inch calculator. SFC is designed for field use by fire sprinkler fitters and professionals. Sprinkler Fitter Calculator includes:
- Feet and Inch calculator with 100 entry history list
- meter, cm, and mm support
- Fraction support, 1/8" increments
- Take out values for common fittings and valves
- Angle calculator for 90, 45, 22.5, and 11.25 degree piping offsets
- Note taker with share capability (sharing available on mobile only)
- Light and dark themes
